identity.name: Obsidian Flow
identity.concept: A developer-focused command center. High contrast, keyboard-centric feel, deep matte surfaces.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-600 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-white/10 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/20 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500/50 focus:border-indigo-500/50 transition-all w-full
inputs.hero: bg-transparent border-none text-2xl md:text-3xl text-white placeholder:text-zinc-700 px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none w-full font-light tracking-tight

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

list_item.base: group flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-transparent border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required libraries: `npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`.
Setup global styles in `index.css`: Force dark mode background `#050505` and text color `#EDEDED`.
Configure Tailwind: Add custom colors from the palette section to `tailwind.config.js`.
Auth Pages: Create a centered 'Access Terminal' card. Use `framer-motion` for a subtle entry animation.
Dashboard: Implement the 'Hero Input' at the top. The list sits below it.
Todo Item: Use a custom checkbox (SVG) that animates when clicked. Text should gain `line-through` and `text-zinc-600` when completed.
State Management: Ensure Loading states use a skeleton pulse (`animate-pulse bg-white/5`) instead of a spinner where possible.
Backend Integration: Use Nhost SDK for auth and GraphQL calls. Handle errors gracefully with toasts (if available) or inline error messages.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`).
You MUST NOT center align the app container globally.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
